The '''''Hornet''-class carrier''' was a large [[Warship/Legends|warship]] developed by [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]] prior to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].<ref name="TST" /> It is considered a [[Frigate/Legends|Frigate]] analog.<ref name="SoR" />

==Characteristics==
The ship was readily identifiable by its slim design and bridge mounted near the center of its bulk. Some were equipped with baffled [[Ion engine/Legends|ion engines]] to reduce their sensor profiles.<ref name="TST" />

==History==
A pair of these vessels supported a squadron of [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95 Headhunters]] and [[Vulture-class starfighter/Legends|''Vulture''-class droid fighters]] in an [[Battle at TFP-9|attack]] on [[Station TFP-9]] intended to capture several [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] [[N-1 starfighter/Legends|N-1 starfighters]] and [[N-X Police Cruiser/Legends|N-X police cruisers]].<ref name="TST" />

{{Ship-stub}}
